pramita p. p.
1 Measured.
2 Measured off, limited, few, little; pramitaviṣayāṃ śaktiṃ viṃdan  Mv. 1. 51 ;  Śi. 16. 80. 
3 Known, understood.
4 Proved, demonstrated.
5 (At the end of comp.) Of such and such extent or measure.
